message.content: This section addresses how to access free daily industry reports. It can answer questions regarding the distribution channel (WeChat group), update frequency (daily), and content type (latest industry reports). It does not contain specific dates, definitions, step-by-step procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
